description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish and two front doors. The doors feature a decorative design with a light tan and brown pattern resembling stylized clouds or waves, and are fitted with small, central handles for opening. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, showcasing a consistent wood grain texture. The cabinet stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it from the ground. Hinges are visible on both sides, indicating the doors swing open. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and suitable for storing items in an urban environment such as a garage, office, or apartment.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with two decorative front doors and small central handles, standing on four short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two decorative doors with a tan and brown pattern and central handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, dark brown wood grain surface and visible door hinges.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned dark brown wooden back panel with visible fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain wood grain and door hinges visible.
